name: Access Mobility Of Arizona Inc

name: Silver Lining Transport
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record matches the West Sacramento / Sacramento operator. Multiple 'Silver Lining Transport' USDOTs exist nationally but none at this address: USDOT 1844204 = AR/TX (20 PUs, 27 drivers); 3262959 = Connell, WA; 1742800 = Romulus, MI; 3305096 = Lehigh Acres, FL; 1715632 = Virginia Beach, VA; 4375000 = Williston, SC; 1904047 = Stockbridge, GA. A related 'SILVER LINING TRANSPORTATION CO LLC' (USDOT 1846899) has a West Sacramento mailing PO Box and Sacramento street address (4247 S Market Ct, 95834) with 1 power unit / 1 driver — SAFER currently marks this record INACTIVE. The West Sacramento NEMT operator at 2521 Port St #E is most likely intrastate-only and operates without active USDOT registration. CA SOS bizfile and OpenCorporates not directly retrievable via WebFetch.

(DBA Carolina Specialty Transport), incorporated 02/26/1996; ~30 employees; ambulance / non-emergency medical / specialty transport services from 438 E Long Ave Ste 2, Gastonia, NC 28054. Owner Greg Christopher; VP Jamie Christopher. Likely intrastate NC ambulance/NEMT operator not required to hold USDOT. Direct NC SOS sosnc.gov lookup blocked (HTTP 403 via WebFetch); recommend manual search at sosnc.gov to retrieve SOSID, formation date, registered agent.

name: Wheelcare Express Inc
entity_status: active (operating per public listings; OpenCorporates CA entity number C1514289)
registry_source: California Secretary of State bizfile / OpenCorporates (entity C1514289)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record under 'WHEELCARE EXPRESS' or 'WHEELCARE' (zero hits). California SOS entity number C1514289 confirmed via OpenCorporates index; full filing detail (formation date, agent, officers) not retrievable because OpenCorporates is CAPTCHA-gated and CA bizfile requires interactive submit. Company website indicates 'Over 40 Years of Quality Non-Emergency Transport Services' (suggesting founding mid-1980s). Operator addresses: 2999 Dutton Ave #C, Santa Rosa, CA 95407 (per input/Yellow Pages/D&B) and 3386 Santa Rosa Ave (per Yelp). Services: wheelchair-accessible non-emergency medical transport (dialysis, oncology, PT, hospital discharge, etc.) across North Bay, East Bay, and Peninsula. One source cites ~8 employees / ~$1.48M annual revenue; another cites a 'modern fleet of around 50-100 vehicles' (inconsistent, not authoritative). Likely intrastate-only NEMT/paratransit operator not required to hold USDOT.

name: Accessible Vans Of NC
registry_source: North Carolina Secretary of State sosnc.gov
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record under 'ACCESSIBLE VANS OF NC', 'ACCESSIBLE VANS', or 'ILDERTON' (zero hits). The 701 S Main St, High Point, NC 27260 address is associated with Ilderton Conversion / Ilderton Vans, the exclusive authorized 'Accessible Vans of America' brand dealer for NC/SC since 1971. This is a wheelchair-van DEALERSHIP / converter (retail + conversion), not a fleet transportation operator — which is why there is no USDOT carrier record. 'Accessible Vans of NC' is likely a doing-business-as / trade name rather than a USDOT-regulated carrier. Not a fit for school-bus / student-transportation tuck-in target. Direct NC SOS lookup blocked (HTTP 403 via WebFetch); recommend manual sosnc.gov search.
